summary: R2 fixes the QA P1 selected district inspector localization gap. Player-facing inspector text now formats district route kinds, obligation kinds, due labels, and route travel-day summaries through the i18n foundation, and the zh-CN selected inspector test coverage now asserts that QA-reported English/raw tokens do not appear in player mode.

tests_run.result: Initial request-changes status was clean. Final status listed only allowed-path modifications: packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, project goal/model/task/thread state files, tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx, and this R2 handoff.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001
tests_run.result: JSON parse/shape OK: task id M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001, status REVIEW, route_to qa_reviewer, human_gate_required false.
R2 writer handoff validated against project schema.

Intermediate focused run failed because the new positive assertion expected陆路 while the current default selected District 1 fixture route kind is coast/沿海. The assertion was corrected to match the current read model while retaining the QA-required negative checks.

Vitest UI suite passed: 1 test file, 16 tests. The zh-CN selected inspector assertion now requires localized route kind/effect text and rejects Road, road, Garrison, continuous, and days in player markup.
Vitest web suite passed: 1 test file, 9 tests.

Playwright Chromium suite passed: 19 tests. The M7 district inspector flow switches to zh-CN on a narrow viewport, asserts localized selected-inspector route/effect text, rejects Road, road, Garrison, continuous, and days, checks bounded district-browser rendering, no horizontal overflow, and no console/page errors.
Vite web build passed; existing large chunk warning remained.
Storybook static build passed and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static; existing large chunk warning remained.
Format check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions: Added explicit i18n keys for district route kinds: road, river, and coast.
Added explicit i18n keys for district obligation kinds: tribute, troop, and garrison.
Added i18n formatting for due labels continuous, war trigger, and numeric day cadence, with fallback through formatReasonCode for unknown future labels.
Added i18n formatting for route-effect travel-day summaries instead of hardcoded English days.
Kept the selected district inspector on existing read models and command previews only; no WorldState ownership, domain data mutation, protocol/schema changes, or sim formula copies were introduced.
Extended zh reason-token labels used by the i18n fallback so player-visible reason chips no longer expose the QA-reported Garrison token.
risks: The current default selected District 1 fixture route kind is coast, so the positive zh-CN test asserts沿海 while still rejecting Road/road as QA requested.

Unknown future reason tokens can still fall back to humanized text through the existing i18n foundation. This R2 covers the QA-reported selected-inspector leaks and the visible related fallback tokens in the current fixture.
Vite and Storybook still emit pre-existing large chunk warnings, but builds pass.
requested_action: Please perform R2 QA review for M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001, focusing on selected district inspector zh-CN localization, player/debug separation, and the new focused UI/Playwright assertions. Do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED until QA passes.
